sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5315" key="a(mmatismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁμματ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n5315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tieing, knotting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:43:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.43.1</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:28:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.28.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
